case_title: CLARK, REX J. vs. PREFERRED TRAVEL SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, REX J. AS TO DEFENDANT PREFERRED TRAVEL SERVICES, A PARTNERSHIP OF FRED BUSCH AND DEE BUSCH BUSCH, FRED, INDIVIDUALLY BUSCH, DEE, INDIVIDUALLY
